purpose: Credit cycle hedging framework targeting amplification mechanisms rather than unpredictable triggers, designed to be actionable regardless of trigger timing
components: Layer 1: CDX HY options for direct credit spread protection
Layer 2: MOVE index exposure for rates volatility hedge covering basis trade and Treasury supply risk
Layer 3: CLO equity avoidance to remove exposure to the most leveraged and opaque part of the credit stack
current_assessment: Addresses identified amplification channels. CLO equity avoidance is passive risk reduction; CDX HY options and MOVE exposure provide active hedging. Internal inconsistency noted in the long credit vol / short equity vol variant where correlation spikes cause the funding leg to generate losses when the primary leg pays off.
limitations: CDX HY options have negative carry during extended benign periods
MOVE exposure may not fully hedge non-Treasury rate channels
Does not address private credit mark-to-model risk directly
Long credit vol / short equity vol variant has internal inconsistency under own stress scenario
